title: Roasted Gooey Italian Cheese Ravioli
description: A comforting Italian dish featuring roasted ravioli filled with gooey cheese and tahini paste, perfect for a keto-friendly dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ravioli cheese filling, tahini paste, and egg, and mix until well combined.
Add the shredded grana padano cheese, cooked pork sausage, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Use a rolling pin to flatten each ball into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the cheese filling in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the ravioli.
Place the ravioli on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each ravioli.
Drizzle the olive oil over the ravioli and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the ravioli from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
